name: Favorite Sub Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 Loaf Italian bread, cut in half lengthwise
1 package (10 oz) Oscar Mayer All-Beef Hot Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss lettuce with 1/4 cup of the dressing; set aside.
2. Brush cut surfaces of bread with remaining 1/4 cup dressing.
3. Fill loaf with meat, cheese slices, vegetables, olives, and lettuce mixture.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
VARIATIONS:
Substitute Kraft Caesar Ranch Dressing or Kraft Free Ranch nonfat dressing for Kraft Ranch Dressing.
Substitue 4 to 6 Kaiser rolls for Italian bread loaf.
